en.value: Activity 1.1.1 Orientation with practical session and support to existing user groups (Farmers groups and Forest User Committees) addressing (technical inputs regarding climate change/ agricultural practices/farmer  plant clinic/ FFS: farmers field school along with their various common issues like saving, income generation, sanitation, disaster and climate change, livelihood related issues, and other issues)  Activity 1.1.2 Provide Training Kitchen gardening and provide seed/seedlings for kitchen gardening  in selected clusters level (2 days).(Focusing on newly formed groups)  Activity 1.1.3 Provide training and support of IPM to farmers.   Activity 1.1.4 "Initial livestock support to most vulnerable people (Single women/PWDs/poorest household especially for newly formed group)."  Activity 1.1.5 Provide training and support on establishment model farm Demonstration(MFD) focusing for off seasonal vegetable farming  Activity 1.1.6 Construction of grey water
